values: Preparation guide — audit only; no production import is performed by this workbook
Use a separate row for Uber, Lyft, Spark Driver, etc. on the same date.
date, app, and at least one earnings value. A metadata-only/rest-day row may leave app and earnings blank.
Normal ride/delivery income goes in regular_earnings. Surprise bonuses and Octopus rewards go in bonus_earnings.
source_daily_total, daily_miles, daily_rides, notes, day_closed and goals belong to the day. Enter once on the first row for that date, or repeat identical values.
Leave blank. Use 0 only when the value is truly known to be zero.
Plain decimal numbers only: 125.50. Do not use currency symbols or thousands separators.
Daily total only. Never divide or allocate daily miles across apps.
Daily total only. Historical ride counts need a day-level preservation path; do not invent shifts.
Optional, maximum 180 characters. Notes never affect metrics.
Historical days normally use TRUE. Use FALSE only for a genuinely open current day.
The future importer should skip exact matches automatically.
The future importer should stop and ask per day. Default is Keep existing; never add totals together.
Do not create historical earnings snapshots. Their timestamps must represent real updates observed at the time.
Leave absent when times are unknown. Streex must not calculate $/hour from fabricated duration.
